messages.content: any suggestions to add-ons from chrome or other browers.

What kind of add-ons do you want (privacy, productivity, dev tools, shopping, video, etc.)? Meanwhile, here are solid, widely trusted picks (available on Chrome and often Firefox/Edge too):

## Privacy & security
- **uBlock Origin** (Chrome/Firefox/Edge): Best all-around ad/tracker blocker.
- **Bitwarden** (all major browsers): Password manager (free + solid).
- **Privacy Badger** (Chrome/Firefox): Tracker blocking with minimal setup.
- **ClearURLs** (Chrome/Firefox): Removes tracking junk from links.
- **HTTPS Everywhere** (legacy now; most browsers do this natively): Only if you need it for older setups.

## Productivity
- **Dark Reader**: Dark mode for websites.
- **OneTab**: Collapse many tabs into a list to reduce memory use.
- **SimpleRead / Reader View** (varies by browser): Cleaner reading.
- **Loom**: Quick screen recording + sharing.
- **Grammarly** or **LanguageTool**: Writing/spell/style help (LanguageTool is more privacy-friendly).

## Shopping / price tracking (use cautiously for privacy)
- **Keepa** (Amazon price history).
- **Camelizer** (CamelCamelCamel for Amazon).

## Developer / power-user
- **React Developer Tools** / **Vue Devtools** (if you use those frameworks).
- **Wappalyzer**: Detects site tech stack.
- **JSON Formatter**: Makes JSON readable in-browser.

## YouTube / media quality-of-life
- **SponsorBlock**: Skips sponsored segments on YouTube.
- **Enhancer for YouTube**: Extra controls (speed, UI tweaks).

## Notes & reading later
- **Raindrop.io**: Bookmark manager.
- **Pocket** (built into Firefox, also extension elsewhere).

### Quick recommendations by goal
- **Best “starter pack”**: uBlock Origin + Bitwarden + Dark Reader + OneTab.
- **More privacy-focused**: uBlock Origin + ClearURLs + Privacy Badger (or just uBlock with stricter settings).

Tell me:
1) Which browser you use (Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Brave, Safari)?  
2) Your main goal (privacy, speed, school/work, dev, YouTube, shopping)?  
…and I’ll tailor a short list.
